abilities.name: Leap Aside
abilities.text: After an enemy attack targeting this model fails, this model may place itself within 3".

abilities.name: Shadow Swap
abilities.text: Once per activation. When this model is dealt damage, it may kill a friendly Sunless Self within 6" to reduce that damage by 2 (to a minimum of 0).

abilities.name: Shadowed Images
abilities.text: Once per activation. After a Scheme marker is made within 6", this model may discard a card to summon a Sunless Self within 1" of the marker.

actions.name: Darkened Chi
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may draw range and LoS from any friendly Sunless Self. If this model is in concealing terrain, this action receives +1 Skl.

triggers.name: Duality
triggers.text: Enemy only. This model must choose: both players draw a card or both players discard a card.

triggers.name: Maneuver
triggers.text: Another ally within LoS may move up to 3".

triggers.name: Assassinate
triggers.text: After killing, gain a Fast token.

actions.name: Shuriken
actions.effects: This model may move up to 3".

triggers.name: Split Shade
triggers.text: Summon a Sunless Self in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Shadow Bound
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Ally only. If the target is a Sunless Self, increase this action's Skl by +2.
actions.effects: Place this model in base contact with the target. Then, place the target in base contact with an ally within 6" of it.

triggers.name: Split Shade
triggers.text: Summon a Sunless Self in base contact with the target.
